title: Add tools field to prompt files
description: Add `tools` field to prompt files to scope tool availability per workflow. The start prompt prioritizes research/planning tools, the figma-to-code prompt prioritizes Figma MCP tools, etc.
acceptance_criteria: Given start.prompt.md specifies tools, when CTO runs via /start, then only CTO-appropriate tools are available
Given figma-to-code.prompt.md specifies tools, when invoked, then Figma MCP tools are prioritized
Given prompt file tools take precedence over agent defaults, when both are present, then the prompt file tools win
